subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-10-12
subcodes.first_line: The first bestowal of God in the world of humanity is Religion, because religion consists of divine teachings.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول موهبت الهیه در عالم انسانی دین است زیرا دین تعالیم الهی است البته تعالیم
subcodes.subjects: @Muhammad; Islam, @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @Christ; Christianity, @Moses, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @oneness; unity of religion, @religion as reality; definitions of religion
